subject: feat(debug): add diagnoseFailure utility per DEBUG_SYSTEM.md spec
body:
Shared utility for distinguishing API failure modes: no-cors HEAD
probe differentiates CORS blocks (server reachable) from deployment
failures (server unreachable), with offline/browser-blocked fallback.
Exported from debugLog.js for use by diagnostic panel and error
handlers.

Tags: debug
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor

title: add diagnoseFailure utility per DEBUG_SYSTEM.md spec
